nodes.label: P2.5 — multi-block: GD *between* shallow SCFF
nodes.rationale: Fixed total SCFF depth=8, varying GD-checkpoint cadence N in {1,2,4,8} blocks x mode {read (boost readouts) vs write (re-inject GD rep)}.

nodes.label: read vs write fork
nodes.rationale: read N=8: 0.302 (+0.010 vs pure-SCFF 0.292) at 38.5k backward weights. write N=8: 0.205 (-0.087) at the same backward cost. pure-GD ceiling: 0.354 at 230k backward weights.

nodes.label: P2.5 verdict: read earns depth marginally+cheaply; write fails decisively
nodes.rationale: read reaches ~85% of pure-GD accuracy at ~17% of its backward cost (~6x saving). write is actively harmful because the GD-realigned hidden is class-collapsed.
